// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (g), round-10 wrapper-agnostic
// discriminator: a NEW wrapper that spawns bd via
// exec.LookPath("bd")+exec.Command(bdPath, ...), matching neither
// bead.RunBD nor Sandbox.runBD by name. The exec seam inside it must
// be discovered and flagged; once classified caller-audited, its
// id-passing caller must be flagged in turn.
package fixture

import (
	"os/exec"
)

func myFutureBDDriver(args ...string) ([]byte, error) {
	bdPath, err := exec.LookPath("bd")
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return exec.Command(bdPath, args...).Output()
}

func callsFutureDriver(specID string) ([]byte, error) {
	return myFutureBDDriver("show", specID, "--json")
}
